case_title: MANUEL ARVEA VS. CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT, KURT
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARVEA, MANUEL
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARVEA, MANUEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARVEA, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL-SUBMITTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARVEA, MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT, KURT $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $232.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,732.50, COMBINED MEDICAL BILLS AND PAIN & SUFFERING. DEFENDANT ADMITTED REAR ENDING VEHICLE 5-10 MPH. DRS CONCURR WARRANTED TREATMENT. NOTE: PLAINTIFF SOUGHT "ATM" DEAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED AUG-15-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $47.50) SERVED AUG-14-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, KURT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2022 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF MANUEL ARVEA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT KURT SCHEIDT IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCES FOR DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
